english: At dawn I remember the truth of the Self, which shines in my heart
roman: Pratah smarami hridi samsphurad atma tattvam

english: Being-consciousness-bliss, the state of the supreme swan, the fourth state
roman: Sachit sukham parama hamsa gatim turiyam

english: Which is aware of dream, waking and deep sleep always
roman: Yat svapna jagara sushupti mavaiti nityam

english: That pure Brahman am I — not this assembly of elements
roman: Tad Brahma nishkalam aham na cha bhuta sanghah

english: At dawn I worship with the mind that which is beyond words
Words shine fully by whose grace alone
Which the Vedas describe by the words not this, not this
That god of gods, the unborn, the infallible — they call him the foremost
roman: Tam deva devam ajam achyutam ahur agryam

english: At dawn meditate on the single unborn desireless Purusha
roman: Pratah smaret purush amekam ajam nirihm

english: Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva in one — the pure undivided
In whom the three groups of gods are united
roman: Yasmin trayo deva gana uh sameta

english: They praise that all-encompassing great Lord
